children.heading: .—Grade on Transfer
children.label: a .—Grade on Transfer
children.text: Unless entitled to a higher grade under another provision of law, a reserve commissioned officer, other than a commissioned warrant officer, who is transferred to the Retired Reserve is entitled to be placed on the retired list established by in the highest grade in which he served satisfactorily, as determined by the Secretary concerned and in accordance with , in the armed force in which he is serving on the date of transfer.section 12774(a) of this titlesection 1370a of this title

children.heading: .—Effect of Subsequent Recall to Active Status
children.label: b .—Effect of Subsequent Recall to Active Status

children.text: If a member of the Retired Reserve who is a commissioned officer is recalled to an active status in the Selected Reserve of the Ready Reserve under and completes not less than two years of service in such active status, the member is entitled to an adjustment in the retired grade of the member in the manner provided in .section 10145(d) of this titlesection 1370a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is recalled to serve in a position of adjutant general required under or in a position of assistant adjutant general subordinate to such a position of adjutant general;section 314 of title 32

children.label: B
children.text: completes at least one year of service in such position; and

children.label: C
children.text: fails to complete the minimum two years of service solely because the appointment of the member to such position is terminated or vacated as described in .section 324(b) of title 32
